parameters.query:
SELECT  cs.club_id,  cs.sport_id,  cs.date,  cs.court_number,  cs.time_slot,  cs.is_available,  cs.updated_at,  r.user_id   AS bot_user_id, u.full_name AS bot_user_name,  u.user_name AS bot_username 
FROM club_schedules cs
LEFT JOIN reservations r  ON  cs.date = r.date  AND cs.time_slot::time = r.time_start::time  AND cs.court_number = 'Badminton ' || r.court
LEFT JOIN users u  ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE cs.date = $1::date  AND cs.sport_id = 84
ORDER BY cs.time_slot, cs.court_number

SELECT  cs.club_id,  cs.sport_id,  cs.date,  cs.court_number,  cs.time_slot,  cs.is_available,  cs.updated_at,  r.user_id   AS bot_user_id, u.full_name AS bot_user_name,  u.user_name AS bot_username 
FROM club_schedules cs
LEFT JOIN reservations r  ON  cs.date = r.date  AND cs.time_slot::time = r.time_start::time  AND cs.court_number = 'Badminton ' || r.court
LEFT JOIN users u  ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE cs.date = $1::date  AND cs.sport_id = 84
ORDER BY cs.time_slot, cs.court_number
